seniority.level: Mid-Senior IC (likely PM II / Senior PM, early in senior career)
level_signals: 4-7 years of experience in a product-related role
This role suits someone early in their PM career who loves to learn, collaborate, and build meaningful solutions
Title is Senior Product Manager but framing is early-senior

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4-7 years of experience in a product-related role (e.g. Product Manager, APM, startup operator, founder, or product analyst).
Proven track record of building or launching products end-to-end.
Experience collaborating closely with engineering and design teams to deliver value quickly.
Excellent written and verbal communication; able to explain complex ideas simply and effectively
Comfortable operating in fast-moving, ambiguous environments.
Familiarity using AI in your day-to-day product work, such as prototyping, research, or analysis.
Experience in an early-stage or high-growth startup environment.

scope.surface: Open finance / financial data connectivity products serving developers and financial institutions
core_responsibilities: Own a product area: define problems, write clear requirements, and drive execution with cross-functional teams.
Shape the roadmap using data, feedback, and market signals.
Collaborate with Engineering and Design to deliver intuitive, high-quality experiences.
Use metrics and user insights to measure and improve outcomes.
Communicate clearly, align stakeholders, and guide decisions.
Act with a founder mindset–simplify, move fast, and embrace feedback.
Learn continuously and help raise the bar for Plaid's products and culture.

compensation.equity_form: equity and/or commission dependent on position

green_flags: Explicitly encourages candidates to apply even if experience doesn't fully match
Clear scope: open finance/connectivity product area with millions of users
Equity mentioned as part of compensation package
Comprehensive benefits plan (medical, dental, vision, 401k) explicitly stated
Inclusive hiring language; disability accommodations contact provided
Mission-driven company with strong market position (12,000+ FIs, Fortune 500 clients)
red_flags: Compensation range not disclosed despite multiple office locations with likely pay differentials
Location/remote policy not stated in JD body — unclear if hybrid, onsite, or remote
Title says 'Senior' but JD text says 'early in their PM career' — potential seniority mismatch or misleading framing
No specific product area or team named — scope of ownership is vague
